sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from Equation (4.12): [(Sum_Current + Sum_Previous) / 2] / Total_N'(X). Optimal_f calculated via recursive summation of probability density functions from historical trade distribution. Specific f value not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by calculating cumulative probability through recursive summation of probability density functions, dividing the averaged running sum by the total cumulative probability to derive optimal allocation.
